description: Composition Orange kurta made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar with a V-neck, mock buttoned chest placket, hakoba work along the empire waist with pin tucks below it, three-quarter sleeves with cuffs and a mid-sleeve button flap, and has a curved vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear art wherever you go! The soft fabric and blend of colours makes this kurta from aneri a fab buy. The wooden buttons on the mock placket add to the ethnic appeal, while the mid-sleeve buttoned flaps allow you to change your style statement with ease. Pair it with leggings or jeans, mojris and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
